title: angelica tarokoensis
intro: Angelica tarokoensis, a species of flowering plant in the carrot family, is native to Taiwan. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Angelica tarokoensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
